title: eriocoma gracilis
intro: Eriocoma gracilis, also known as Silvertop Needlegrass, is a perennial grass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eriocoma gracilis include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
